%Text automatically generated by txt2latex
\section*{VERSION 2.5.3}
\begin{itemize}
\item Maintenance release. NO API break.
\item Complete rewrite of the documentation structure.
\item The API is now written as man-pages:
\begin{itemize}
\item codata(1)
\item codata(3)
\item codata\_version(3)
\item codata\_constant\_type(3)
\end{itemize}
\end{itemize}

\section*{VERSION 2.5.2}
\begin{itemize}
\item Maintenance release. No API break.
\item Use prep(1) for auto-generating the version parameter.
\item Add new API for getting the version number:
\begin{itemize}
\item version() instead of get\_version().
\item get\_version() is marked as deprecated, it will be removed in the
      next major release 3.0 when the new codata constants will be 
      released i.e. 2026/2027.
\end{itemize}
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.5.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Code refactoring and cleaning: trailing spaces, empty lines, formatted comments.
\item Remove specific modules for C API: defined in the same module as Fortran equivalents.
\item No API break.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.5.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Add a response\_file ( \href{https://urbanjost.github.io/M\_CLI2/set\_args.3m\_cli2.html}{urbanjost.github.io/M\_CLI2/set\_args.3m\_cli2.html)}  
      capability for the CLI.
\item Add rst output for the man pages.
\item Integration of the man pages in the online documentation generated with sphinx.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.4.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Maintenance release.
\item Fix option formatting in help text and man page.
\item Refactoring
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.4.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Add tables for each codata year containing all constants.
\item Add CLI codata(1) for searching constants.
\item Refactoring code.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.3.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Refactoring the configure.sh script.
\item Remove support for 3.14t. No official release on python.org.
\item If binaries for Python 3.14t are needed you need to compile them by
yourself.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.3.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Remove support for Python 3.9 and add support for Python 3.14(t).
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.2.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Switch to UCRT64 for Windows binaries.
\item Switch to sphinx documentation using fspxh (ttps://github.com/jalvesz/fspx).
\item Update references with publication for codata 2022.
\item Update compilation flags for compatibility with stdlib.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.1.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item No code change.
\item Code refractoring and cleaning
\item Update CI/CD workflows.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.1.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Roll back to C API in Fortran code: easier maintenance.
\item Roll back to compiled C extension for python: easier maintenance.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.0.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Fix bug in version for Fortran code.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 2.0.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Drop compiled extensions for Python.
\item Pure Python code for constants auto-generated as it is the case for
      the Fortran code.
\item Pure C code for constants auto-generated as it is the case for the
      Fortran code.
\item API break:
\begin{itemize}
\item No more C API in the Fortran code.
\item Use the pure C code to build a C library.
\end{itemize}
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 1.2.2}
\begin{itemize}
\item Fix conflict that could occur with C API modules. Add prefix in
      module names.
\item Cleanup and refractoring.
\item Documentation update.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 1.2.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Refractoring
\item Merge back C API and python wrapper.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 1.2.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Refractoring
\item Documentation update.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 1.1.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item C API and Python wrapper moved to their own repositories.
\item API break: C API is no more provided by default. Use the optional C
wrapper.
\item Code cleanup
\item Documentation update
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 1.0.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Add codata values for 2010, 2014 and 2018.
\item Code refractoring and code cleaning.
\item Documentation update and switch to only FORD documentation.
\item Rewrite code generators in python.
\item Generate source code for stdlib.
\item API break: constants are defined as DT like in stdlib.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.10.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Remove remove generation of the version module.
\item Add tests using the test-drive framework.
\item Explicit parameter constants for Fortran and protected constants for C API.
\item Minor fixes in documentation.
\item Code cleanup.
\item Merge of all code for autogeneration in one file.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.9.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item No API changes.
\item Automatic generation of the version module.
\item Generic Makefiles for automatic the building process of the library and the pywrapper.
\item Add targets: build, build\_debug, test, test\_debug.
\item Minor fixes in documentation.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.8.2}
\begin{itemize}
\item No API changes.
\item Improve Makefile for generating the source code at each compilation.
\item Source generator rewritten in Fortran.
\item Switch to pyproject.toml for the Python wrapper.
\item Minor fixes in documentation.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.8.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Use shared library in python wrapper.
\item Minor fixes in documentation.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.8.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Back to the approach with a library.
\item Compatible with fpm.
\item Configuration file for setting all the environmental variables.
\item Global makefile for building a static library (through fpm) and a shared library.
\item Automatic copy of the necessary sources for the python wrapper.
\item Python wrapper built with the static library
\begin{itemize}
\item no dependency on a shared library.
\item sources and static library embeded in the python wrapper.
\end{itemize}
\item FORD for documenting the Fortran code.
\item Integration of the FORD documentation into the main documentation with sphinx.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.7.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Minor fixes in generator code
\item Add automatic copy of c sources for the python wrapper.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.7.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Migrate documentation from doxygen to sphinx+breathe.
\item Add YEAR constant indicating the year of the codata constants.
\item Refractoring
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.6.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Created documentation.
\item Fixed missing uncertainties for Cpython.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.5.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Changed the complete approach by not generating a library but only source files for different languages.
\item Available languages: Fortran, C, python, CPython
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.4.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Bring back pywrapper in the codata repository to sync versions.
\item Improvements of the documentation.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.3.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Only last codata constants.
\end{itemize}


\section*{VERSION 0.2.1}
\begin{itemize}
\item Integration of Intel Fortran compiler and MSVC in cmake scripts.
\item Add specifications and instructions for compiling on Windows
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.2.0}
\begin{itemize}
\item Bug fixes for the codata 2010.
\item Bug fixes in the tests linked to the codata 2010.
\item Add python wrapper for the number of constants method.
\end{itemize}



\section*{VERSION 0.1.0}
Implementation of:
\begin{itemize}
\item the parser of the codata raw data
\item the generator of the Fortran modules
\item the C API and C header
\item the python wrapper (will be moved to its repository next release).
\end{itemize}
